data.description: Federal Reserve Board announces approval of application by OceanFirst Financial Corp.

data.title: KBRA Assigns AA+ Rating to Various State of Connecticut General Obligation Bonds; Affirms Rating for Parity Bonds
data.description: In New York, credit rating agency KBRA has assigned a AA+ long-term rating to the State of Connecticut for various bonds, including General Obligation Bonds (2026 Series A), General Obligation Refunding Bonds (2026 Series B), and Taxable General Obligation Bonds (2026 Series A). KBRA has also affirmed the AA+ long-term rating for the State's existing General Obligation Bonds, with a Stable Outlook. These ratings are based on key credit considerations related to the State's financial stability.
Yukon Metals welcomes Lindsay Wilson as VP of Investor Relations & Communications.

data.title: Compass Therapeutics to Announce Topline Secondary Endpoints from the Phase 2/3 COMPANION-002 Study of Tovecimig in Patients with Biliary Tract Cancer
data.description: On April 24, 2026, headquartered in Boston, Compass Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: CMPX), a biopharmaceutical company focusing on oncology, shared plans to conduct a webcast on April 27, 2026, at 8:00 am ET. The webcast aims to discuss the top-line secondary endpoints of its Phase 2/3 COMPANION-002 clinical trial. This study evaluates the efficacy of tovecimig, a DLL4 x VEGF-A bispecific antibody, combined with paclitaxel in individuals suffering from advanced biliary tract cancer (BTC).

data.title: Lee Enterprises, Inc. Names Chief Executive and Chief Financial Officers
data.description: Nathan Bekke and Joshua Rinehults have been appointed as Chief Executive Officer and Chief Financial Officer, respectively, at Lee Enterprises. This decision comes as a strategic move for the company which is aiming to enhance its leadership structure. With Bekke leading as CEO and Rinehults as CFO, Lee Enterprises is poised to capitalize on their expertise. The appointments are significant as the company looks to navigate through the competitive market landscape and capitalize on emerging opportunities. The new leadership will play a crucial role in driving the company forward and achieving its financial goals.

data.title: METROCITY BANKSHARES, INC. REPORTS EARNINGS FOR FIRST QUARTER 2026
data.description: Atlanta-based MetroCity Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: MCBS) announced their financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The company, which owns Metro City Bank, reported a net income of $22.3 million, equivalent to $0.77 per diluted share. This marks an increase from the previous quarter's net income of $18.3 million.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Leads Charge Ahead Of U.S.-Iran Peace Talks; Telecom Stock Tumbles (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a slight decline, whereas the Nasdaq saw a rise fueled by the surging Intel stock. AI stocks AMD and Arm also witnessed significant increases. The Nasdaq spearheaded the market charge as peace talks between the U.S. and Iran loom ahead, with telecom stock showing a notable decline.

data.title: Westamerica Bancorporation Increases Stock Repurchase Plan Authorization
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Westamerica Bancorporation (NASDAQ: WABC) based in SAN RAFAEL, Calif., disclosed an extension in its stock repurchase plan authorization by 2,000,000 shares. With the addition of the newly approved shares and the 785,023 shares still available from the previous approval, the company now has 2,785,023 shares left under the enhanced plan. This amount corresponds to 11.8 percent of the firm’s common stock that was in circulation as of March 31, 2026.

data.title: SEO Week 2026 Brings AI Search Leaders to New York--With The LOX and Method Man Headlining Algorhythms After-Party
data.description: On April 24, 2026, the SEO Week 2026 conference, hosted by iPullRank, a top performance marketing agency, is set to take place in New York City from April 27 to April 30. The event will gather key figures in search, artificial intelligence, and digital technologies.

data.title: $701M in crypto tied to Southeast Asia scams frozen by the US, disrupting networks targeting Americans with fake sites and Telegram channels.
data.description: A total of $701 million in cryptocurrency connected to scam networks in Southeast Asia that are specifically targeting Americans has been frozen by the United States. The operation involved shutting down fraudulent websites and Telegram channels used by these networks.

data.title: Rancher’s Premium Smokehouse Teams Up with Kroger to Introduce Product to Aisles Beginning April 27
data.description: Dallas-based Rancher’s Premium Smokehouse has partnered with Kroger to launch its products in stores starting on April 27. This collaboration will bring Rancher’s Premium Smokehouse products to the aisles of Kroger locations, expanding the reach of the brand. The partnership is set to introduce a variety of premium smoked goods to consumers across the country.

data.title: Quantum computer cracks 15-bit encryption key as Bitcoin community debates arrival of cryptographically powerful quantum computers.
data.description: The Bitcoin community is currently discussing the timeline for the arrival of quantum computers, with some speculating that they could be just around the corner while others believe they are still decades away.

data.title: DaBella Proudly Supports the National Brain Tumor Society with a $20,000 Donation in Support of Their Mission to Defeat Brain Tumors
data.description: In a bid to strengthen its ties with the communities it operates in, a family-owned home improvement company based in Austin, Texas, has recently announced a partnership with a leading brain tumor research and advocacy organization in the United States. This collaboration marks a significant step for DaBella and demonstrates their dedication to giving back to the society. The partnership was finalized on April 24, 2026, and is expected to make a substantial impact on both organizations. The company's commitment to philanthropy and community engagement is further emphasized through this alliance, showcasing their genuine concern for making a positive difference.

data.title: Delaware Chancery Court Rules in Favor of Anaptys by Dismissing Tesaro’s Anticipatory Breach Claim
data.description: On April 24, 2026, in San Diego, AnaptysBio, Inc. (Nasdaq: ANAB) revealed that the Delaware Chancery Court has rejected Tesaro's anticipatory breach of contract claim against Anaptys. This pertains to the financial partnerships for Jemperli with GSK and imsidolimab with Vanda. The court ruling affirmed Anaptys' stance that it has not violated the Collaboration and Exclusive License Agreement with Tesaro, a subsidiary of GSK, regarding the advancement and marketing of Jemperli. This development marks a significant milestone in Anaptys' legal battle, with the dismissal of Tesaro's claim.
